ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the conference */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the conference */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or organizing body of the conference */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the conference (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conference */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or organization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., attendee, speaker, organizer) */,
  "institutional_department" TEXT /* Department of the participant's affiliated institution */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the session belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., keynote, panel, workshop) */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker for the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the paper is submitted to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the paper */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was submitted */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "paper_type" TEXT /* Type of paper (e.g., research, poster, workshop) */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* List of co-authors for the paper */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the paper submission (e.g., submitted, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session attended */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who attended */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
